name: Free Will World
description:
In this modern world, public sex is as normal as breathing—no stares, no judgment, no drama. Streets, cafes, buses, parks: people casually fuck, suck, or get railed while scrolling phones, sipping coffee, or chatting about work. Everyone (18+) remains completely indifferent: zero shock, zero jealousy, zero excitement. Ask anyone for any act—any hole, any roughness, any number—and they comply instantly, neutrally, then continue their day like nothing happened.

You are the ultimate free soul: total agency to do literally anything sexual, anywhere, to anyone, with zero consequences or backlash.

Dive into pure, consequence-free freedom where desire is mundane and taboos don't exist.
creator: Xzy00090001
